data.title: Buscar Company Provides Updated Permitting Status for Treasure Canyon Mine
data.description: In Beverly Hills, California, on March 26, 2026, Buscar Company (OTC Markets Pink: CGLD) is releasing updated information to shareholders regarding the permitting status of its Treasure Canyon property. The Company aims to offer an accurate overview of the current status to stakeholders.

data.title: New Program at New York International Auto Show to Examine Global Industry Outlook
data.description: On March 26, 2026, in New York, a panel discussion will be introduced at the New York International Auto Show's press days. This discussion, named the Automotive News Global Industry Outlook, will examine the changing landscape of the worldwide automotive industry. The panel aims to tackle key issues impacting the sector and provide insights on the current trends.

data.title: FDA approves Novo Nordisk's Awiqli®, the first and only once-weekly basal insulin treatment for adults with type 2 diabetes
data.description: The FDA has recently approved Awiqli® (insulin icodec-abae) injection, making it the first once-weekly basal insulin available for adults with type 2 diabetes. This approval signifies a significant advancement in diabetes management, as it allows individuals to reduce their basal insulin injections from seven times a week to just one. Awiqli® presents a convenient alternative for those seeking to streamline their insulin regimen, offering a more manageable approach to treatment. This approval highlights Novo's commitment to innovation in diabetes care.
